generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, you know how important it is to be prepared. The recent cuts to civil defense budgets are putting our communities at risk. Experts agree that local preparedness programs are our first line of defense against emerging threats. Don't let bureaucrats in Washington gamble with our safety - demand your representatives reinstate full funding for civil defense now. #CommunitySafetyFirst #PreparedNotScared
